title: MolecularCraft
description: A minechem-like mod for newer version of Minecraft and Fabric Loader
body:
A minechem-like mod for newer version of Minecraft and Fabric Loader.


This mod allows you to extract the molecules and atoms your items are made of to create new items from them.


Attribution of a formula to an item is done through datapacks, for more info you can look at the wiki.

The mod is in alpha stage, there are still some missing feature to be implemented/fixed:
- machines don't consume energy yet.
- not all items have a formula.
- formula can't be different depending on NBT.

Discord: https://discord.gg/2HKGqJE
